tools.Name: Chandra OCR 2
tools.Description: A state-of-the-art OCR model that converts images and PDFs into structured HTML, Markdown, or JSON while preserving complex layout information.
tools.Use_Case: Extracting structured data from complex tables, forms, and handwritten documents, including math and multilingual support.

tools.Name: Unsloth
tools.Description: A framework for training and running open models (e.g., Qwen, DeepSeek, Gemma) with high efficiency, up to 2x faster training and 70% less VRAM usage.
tools.Use_Case: Local fine-tuning and inference of LLMs, vision models, and embedding models on consumer or enterprise GPUs.

tools.Name: Open SWE
tools.Description: An open-source, asynchronous coding agent framework built on LangGraph and Deep Agents, designed for building custom, secure, and isolated engineering agents.
tools.Use_Case: Automating software engineering workflows such as PR creation, issue resolution, and code maintenance within a secure, sandboxed environment.
